LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-COMPLAINANT WARD ALAN EMERY CONSTRUCTION'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT CONKLIN BROTHERS INCORPORATED IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTIONS 4 AND 5 BECAUSE THE MOTION WOULD NOT FULLY RESOLVE EITHER CAUSE OF ACTION, EACH OF WHICH INCLUDES A CLAIM OF DAMAGES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF DUTY TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. APPEARANCES - ATTY. LYN D. TADLOCK OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GRAY & DUFFY LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 365-7343 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. TYSON ARBUTHNOT OF ROGERS JOSEPH O'DONNELL, TEL. NO. 365-5323 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CONKLIN BROTHERS INCORPORATED.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-COMPLAINANT WARD ALAN EMERY CONSTRUCTION'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT CONKLIN BROTHERS INCORPORATED IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTIONS 4 AND 5 BECAUSE THE MOTION WOULD NOT FULLY RESOLVE EITHER CAUSE OF ACTION, EACH OF WHICH INCLUDES A CLAIM OF DAMAGES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE ISSUE OF DUTY TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
